findings.message: Direct API calls using 'request.get' in component instead of using an API module (e.g., 'healthApi') as seen in other parts of the codebase (e.g., 'graphApi').
findings.suggestion: Create a new API module 'frontend/src/api/modules/health.ts' to encapsulate health and config related requests.

findings.message: Use of 'as any' for API response typing.
findings.suggestion: Define and use TypeScript interfaces for API responses to improve type safety and maintainability.

findings.message: Good use of 'el-skeleton' for initial configuration loading state.
Connectivity test provides clear, descriptive feedback via 'el-alert' for different statuses (ok, skipped, error).
Sensitive API keys are properly masked by only showing configuration status (boolean flags) instead of actual keys.
Clean layout using 'el-descriptions' for configuration details and clear separation for the testing section.

passed_checks: Secure handling of API keys (no exposure)
Responsive layout using Element Plus components
Proper loading state indicators for async operations
Clear error handling and user feedback in connectivity test
summary: LLM 配置前端实现质量较高，UX 友好且安全性处理得当。主要改进点在于遵循项目现有的 API 模块化模式，以及增强 TypeScript 类型定义以减少 'any' 的使用。
